org.docgene.model

Class XMLNoteRef

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.docgene.model.XMLNoteRef
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    org.docgene.model.AnchorElement, ParagraphElement, StyledElement

    public class XMLNoteRef
extends java.lang.Object
implements ParagraphElement, org.docgene.model.AnchorElement
    Represent the a reference to a note.
